query:
SELECT id, COUNT(*) as count 
FROM testimonials 
GROUP BY id 
HAVING count > 1;

SELECT id, userName, createdAt 
FROM testimonials 
WHERE id IN (90009, 90010)
ORDER BY id, createdAt;
